title: drive_result
description: The inner-pipeline drive output for one case — REPORTED, not self-graded. The verifying room's independent oracle decides the outcome.

exit.description: The inner workflow's terminal exit (shipped | needs-human | not-reproducible | abandoned).

deliverable_present.description: Is the claimed deliverable actually present in the workspace? (false is honest when the maker produced nothing.)

oracle_pass.description: Optional: did the operator's oracle pass? The verify room re-checks regardless.

trace.description: Path to the drive's trace (cost/token evidence).

summary.description: Short factual summary of what happened.

requires_operator.description: True when a serious operator decision is needed.

operator_question.description: Serious question to surface through the story operator channel.

operator_impact.description: What the operator decision changes, distinct from the question.

exception_severity.description: Severity of the operator exception (serious, critical, high, etc.).

trace_label.description: Short human label for the trace link when shown in operator surfaces.
